name: Adolescent Epic Geckos
teaser: Tag your minions in and out and play strong two-action turns with big payoffs.
mechanics: Tag your minions in and out and play strong two-action turns with big payoffs.
description: Meet the Adolescent Epic Geckos, a dynamic faction from the Half the Battle expansion. This faction excels at unleashing a flurry of actions, with their cards granting an extra action when played as the first action, or unleashing more potent abilities when played as a subsequent action. The Adolescent Epic Geckos are considered a Medium-High complexity faction. They join other notable factions from the same set, including G.I. Gerald, Pearl and the Images, and Rulers of the Cosmos.
cardsTeaser: The Adolescent Epic Geckos faction is comprised of a unique set of cards, featuring a specific mix of minions and actions that set them apart. This faction boasts a distinctive array of 11 standard actions, including six that specifically impact one or more minions: Breaking News, Flip Kick, Gecko Blimp, Gecko Rap, K.C. Smith, Lasagna Party, and The Master’s Teachings. Notably, the faction includes one play-on-minion action, Gecko Power, and five actions that directly enhance a minion's power: Gecko Rap, two instances of Lasagna Party, and two instances of The Master’s Teachings. With no play-on-base actions, the Adolescent Epic Geckos rely on their diverse range of standard actions to drive their gameplay.
actionList:
1x Breaking News - Look at the top four cards of your deck. Draw one and return the rest in any order. If this is your first action played this turn, play an extra action.
1x Flip Kick - Draw a card. If this is your first action played this turn, play an extra action; if not, draw two more cards.
1x Gecko Blimp - If this is your first action played this turn, move one of your minions and play an extra action; if not, move any minion.
1x Gecko Power - Play on a minion. Talent: If you have played at least two other actions this turn, move this minion OR place a +1 power counter on it OR give it +2 power until the end of the turn.
1x Gecko Rap - Swap one of your minions in play for one with a different name and equal or less power in your hand, deck or discard pile. If this is your first action played this turn, play an extra action; if not, place a +1 power counter on the new minion.
2x Lasagna Party - Play an extra minion of power 2 or less. If this is your first action played this turn, play an extra action; if not, place two +1 power counters on a minion at that base.
1x Now You Know: Bullying - Move one of your minions. Special: After a base scores where you didn't win, you may play this card to return one of your minions there to your hand instead.
2x The Master’s Teachings - Place two +1 power counters on one of your minions. If this is your first action played this turn, play an extra action; if not, you may give that minion +2 power until the end of the turn.
actions:
1x Breaking News - Look at the top four cards of your deck. Draw one and return the rest in any order. If this is your first action played this turn, play an extra action.

1x Flip Kick - Draw a card. If this is your first action played this turn, play an extra action; if not, draw two more cards.

1x Gecko Blimp - If this is your first action played this turn, move one of your minions and play an extra action; if not, move any minion.

1x Gecko Power - Play on a minion. Talent: If you have played at least two other actions this turn, move this minion OR place a +1 power counter on it OR give it +2 power until the end of the turn.

1x Gecko Rap - Swap one of your minions in play for one with a different name and equal or less power in your hand, deck or discard pile. If this is your first action played this turn, play an extra action; if not, place a +1 power counter on the new minion.

2x Lasagna Party - Play an extra minion of power 2 or less. If this is your first action played this turn, play an extra action; if not, place two +1 power counters on a minion at that base.

1x Now You Know: Bullying - Move one of your minions. Special: After a base scores where you didn't win, you may play this card to return one of your minions there to your hand instead.

2x The Master’s Teachings - Place two +1 power counters on one of your minions. If this is your first action played this turn, play an extra action; if not, you may give that minion +2 power until the end of the turn.
characters:
1x Hokusai - power 4 - You may place a +1 power counter on one of your minions. Talent: If you have played at least two actions this turn, for each base you may place a +1 power counter on a minion there.

1x Kandinsky - power 4 - This minion gains +1 power until the end of the turn. Talent: If you have played at least two actions this turn, give this minion +2 power until the end of the turn OR move another one of your minions to here.

1x Monet - power 4 - Draw a card. Ongoing: Any time you can play an action, you may instead draw a card and trigger all abilities as though you had played an action.

1x Van Gogh - power 4 - You may shuffle a standard action from your discard pile into your deck. Ongoing: After you play a standard action, you may store it under this card. At the start of your turn or after you win this base, shuffle all cards stored under this card into your deck.

4x June - power 2 - If you have a minion of printed power 4 in play, you may swap it for one with a different name in your hand or deck; if not, you may draw one off the top of your deck.
clarifications:
Here are the official clarifications as they appear in the Half the Battle rulebook:

Gecko Power: If you use Spirit of the Forest’s Ongoing ability with this card, choose any two of the three options in any order.

June: In this ability, “one” means “a minion of printed power 4”.

Monet: You may draw the card instead of a regular action play, a generic extra action play (e.g. K.C. Smith), and a play of a specified kind of action card (e.g. Andko), but not an action play from a specified place (Gal-Woman), nor of a specific action card (e.g. Myaaah!). Drawing the card triggers abilities triggered by the play of an action if they meet the conditions: e.g. Sewer Hideout if it’s the second or higher action play, but not Power Castle since no action is played on a minion.

Van Gogh: If the standard action you play is placed someplace besides the discard pile while it is resolved, you can’t store it under Van Gogh.

name: G.I. Gerald
teaser: Use your fusions in versatile ways for some big bursts of power.
mechanics: Use your fusions in versatile ways for some big bursts of power.
description: Meet the G.I. Gerald, a faction from the Half the Battle expansion, known for leveraging fusion cards to expand your strategic possibilities. With a medium complexity rating, they offer a balanced gameplay experience. They are joined in this set by three other unique factions: Adolescent Epic Geckos, Pearl and the Images, and Rulers of the Cosmos.
cardsTeaser:
Meet the G.I. Gerald faction, a formidable force in the Smash Up universe. At a glance, their card composition consists of a notable array of minions and actions, boasting a substantial total minion base power.

Delving into their actions, it's clear that G.I. Gerald relies on standard actions to drive their strategy, with 19 cards that influence one or more minions in bold ways. Notable actions include multiple instances of Can-Do, Dice Ninja, and Rosie, as well as singular cards like Go, Gerald!, M.O.W.A.T., Mabel Lean, Now You Know: Home Safety, Obstruction, Sawbones, Shellback, and Ski Lift. Specifically, six of these actions are designed to directly amplify a minion's power: Go, Gerald!, M.O.W.A.T., and four instances of Rosie.
actionList:
1x Go, Gerald! - Choose a base. Give each of your minions played there this turn +2 power until the end of the turn.
1x Now You Know: Home Safety - Play an extra minion of power 2 or less. If it is a fusion, you may also use its Action ability. Special: You may play this before a base scores to copy the Action ability of one of your fusions there instead.
actions:
1x Go, Gerald! - Choose a base. Give each of your minions played there this turn +2 power until the end of the turn.

1x Now You Know: Home Safety - Play an extra minion of power 2 or less. If it is a fusion, you may also use its Action ability. Special: You may play this before a base scores to copy the Action ability of one of your fusions there instead.
characters: 1x Viscount - power 5 - Ongoing: Once per turn, after you play a fusion and use its Action ability, you may give this minion +2 power until the end of the turn OR place a +1 power counter on it.
clarifications:
Here are the official clarifications as they appear in the Half the Battle rulebook:

Now You Know: Home Safety, Shellback: When one card copies the ability of another card, the ability is resolved as if the first card had that ability. That card is not considered to actually have that ability in any other way or at other times. Mystic Transference only lets you use the copied talent in the Start Turn phase.

Now You Know: Home Safety: “Instead” here means “instead of this card’s on-play ability”.

Viscount: This is not triggered by using the Action ability of a fusion already in play, or by the Special part of Now You Know: Home Safety.

name: Pearl and the Images
teaser: Bring everyone together, reinforcing even your opponents' minions for some better benefits.
mechanics: Bring everyone together, reinforcing even your opponents' minions for some better benefits.
description: Meet the Pearl and the Images, a unique faction from the Half the Battle set. This cunning group boosts the strength of their opponents' minions, cleverly turning their enemies' power into their own advantage. With a complexity rating of Medium-High, they require strategic thinking to master. The Pearl and the Images join three other factions in this set: Adolescent Epic Geckos, G.I. Gerald, and Rulers of the Cosmos.
cardsTeaser:
Pearl and the Images bring a unique blend of cards to the table, featuring a mix of minions and actions that work together in harmony. Their deck is comprised of a selection of minions and actions, with a notable total minion base power.

Delving into their actions, you'll find a range of effects that can be played on minions or bases. There are two play-on-minion actions, with She's Got the Power appearing twice, allowing for repeated boosts. Additionally, three play-on-base actions are available, including All's Right with the World and two instances of Jam All Night Long. The faction also includes five standard actions, with three of these - Dressing Room, Now You Know: Bike Safety, Love Unites Us, Truly Outstanding, and We’re Up, You’re Down - having effects on one or more minions, and Truly Outstanding specifically increasing a minion's power.
actionList:
1x All's Right with the World - Play on a base. Talent: Give all players’ minions here +1 power until the end of the turn OR for each player, give one of their minions here +2 power until the end of the turn.
1x Dressing Room - Each player may draw a card. Draw a card for each player who does so, including yourself.
2x Jam All Night Long - Play on a base. Talent: Choose a player to play an extra minion of power 2 or less here or reveal a hand with no such minions. Then, if you chose another player and they played a minion, you may draw a card or place a +1 power counter on a minion here.
1x Love Unites Us - All players shuffle all minions of power 2 or less in their discard pile into their deck.
1x Now You Know: Bike Safety - Choose one of your minions on a base. Move that minion and another player’s minion there to another base. Special: You may play this before a base scores; move the chosen minions to the scoring base.
2x She's Got the Power - Play on a minion. Ongoing: Once per turn, after the power of another player’s minion here increases, you may give this minion +3 power until the end of the turn.
1x Truly Outstanding - Place a +1 power counter on any number of other players’ minions. For each one placed, you may place a +1 power counter on one of your minions.
1x We’re Up, You’re Down - Choose a base. Until the start of your next turn, other players’ minions there only add their printed power to their controllers’ total. Special: You may play this before a base scores where you have the most minions. You must choose that base.
actions:
1x All's Right with the World - Play on a base. Talent: Give all players’ minions here +1 power until the end of the turn OR for each player, give one of their minions here +2 power until the end of the turn.

1x Dressing Room - Each player may draw a card. Draw a card for each player who does so, including yourself.

2x Jam All Night Long - Play on a base. Talent: Choose a player to play an extra minion of power 2 or less here or reveal a hand with no such minions. Then, if you chose another player and they played a minion, you may draw a card or place a +1 power counter on a minion here.

1x Love Unites Us - All players shuffle all minions of power 2 or less in their discard pile into their deck.

1x Now You Know: Bike Safety - Choose one of your minions on a base. Move that minion and another player’s minion there to another base. Special: You may play this before a base scores; move the chosen minions to the scoring base.

2x She's Got the Power - Play on a minion. Ongoing: Once per turn, after the power of another player’s minion here increases, you may give this minion +3 power until the end of the turn.

1x Truly Outstanding - Place a +1 power counter on any number of other players’ minions. For each one placed, you may place a +1 power counter on one of your minions.

1x We’re Up, You’re Down - Choose a base. Until the start of your next turn, other players’ minions there only add their printed power to their controllers’ total. Special: You may play this before a base scores where you have the most minions. You must choose that base.
characters:
1x Pearl - power 5 - Talent: Draw a minion of power 2 or less off the top of your deck OR give a minion here +1 power until the end of the turn.

2x Crystal - power 4 - Talent: Place a +1 power counter on another player’s minion to place a +1 power counter on one of your minions at the same base.

3x Ruby - power 2 - You may give all players’ minions here +1 power until the end of the turn.

4x Topaz - power 2 - Ongoing: Once per turn, after the power of another player’s minion increases, you may place a +1 power counter on this minion OR if you have a minion there, you may move this minion to there.
clarifications:
Here are the official clarifications as they appear in the Half the Battle rulebook:

Jam All Night Long: You can choose yourself.

Now You Know: Bike Safety: If there is no other player’s minion at the same base, you can still move your minion.

Now You Know: Bike Safety: “Instead” here means “instead of this card’s on-play ability”.

Topaz, She’s Got the Power: This can trigger in any player’s turn, at any part of the turn, and for any kind of power increase.

Truly Outstanding: When you place the power counters on your minions, you can place more than one on the same minion; recipients don’t have to be on the same base.

We’re Up, You’re Down: Modifications to other players’ minions’ power do count for cards like Obstruction, and toward the overall total power for breaking the base, but not toward their controller’s total for awarding VPs. Since this card says “until X do Y”, it affects minions that are played or moved to its base later on, but not those that move away. If its base scores, it does not affect minions at the base that replaces it.

name: Rulers of the Cosmos
teaser: Grant talents to your minions with play-on-action weapons and transfer them around to increase their usage.
mechanics: Grant talents to your minions with play-on-action weapons and transfer them around to increase their usage.
description: The Rulers of the Cosmos faction, part of the Half the Battle expansion, excels at enhancing their minions with powerful actions. By playing actions on their minions, they unlock additional abilities, making them a formidable force. With a complexity rating of High, they offer a challenging yet rewarding playstyle. They are joined in the Half the Battle set by three other unique factions: Adolescent Epic Geckos, G.I. Gerald, and Pearl and the Images.
cardsTeaser: The Rulers of the Cosmos faction boasts a diverse array of cards, featuring a mix of minions and actions that work together to dominate the battlefield. This faction's deck includes a total of 7 play-on-minion actions, such as Armor of Battle, Fearless Friend, and Powerful Sword, which can significantly enhance their minions' abilities. In addition to these, there are 3 standard actions, including Dolts, Halfwits, Fools, Morons!, MYAAAH!, and Now You Know: Toxic Waste, with one of these actions, **Now You Know: Toxic Waste**, affecting one or more minions. Notably, the Sword That’s Powerful action directly increases a minion's power, providing a potent boost to the faction's overall strength. With no play-on-base actions, the Rulers of the Cosmos focus on empowering their minions to take control of the bases.
actionList:
1x Armor of Battle - Play on a minion. Ongoing: This minion has the ability: “Talent: Increase the breakpoint of this base by 2 for each of your minions here with an action on it until the start of your next turn.”
1x Dolts, Halfwits, Fools, Morons! - Transfer any number of actions on your minions to your other minions. Place a +1 power counter on each of your minions you transferred an action to.
2x Fearless Friend - Play on your minion. Ongoing: This minion has the ability: “Talent: Move this minion.”
1x Magic Weapon - Play on a minion. Ongoing: This minion has the ability: “Talent: This minion gains +1 power until the start of your next turn for each player with a minion here OR if there is only one action on this minion, draw a card.”
1x MYAAAH! - Return a play-on-minion action from one of your minions or from your discard pile to its owner’s hand. Play it as an extra action.
1x Mystic Transference - Play on your minion. Ongoing: At the start of each other player’s turn, choose one of your actions in play that gives a talent. This minion may copy that talent immediately. Talent: Transfer one of your actions between this minion and another of your minions.
1x Now You Know: Toxic Waste - Draw a play-on-minion action from your deck. Special: You may play this before a base scores to transfer an action from one of your minions to another instead; then you may use a talent on the minion the action was transferred to.
1x Powerful Sword - Play on your minion. Ongoing: This minion has the ability: “Talent: This minion is not affected by other players’ cards until the start of your next turn.” Talent: Transfer another action from this minion to another of your minions.
1x Sword That’s Powerful - Play on your minion. Ongoing: This minion has the ability: “Talent: Place a +1 power counter on this minion.” If this minion’s printed power is 5 or more, it has +2 power.
actions:
1x Armor of Battle - Play on a minion. Ongoing: This minion has the ability: “Talent: Increase the breakpoint of this base by 2 for each of your minions here with an action on it until the start of your next turn.”

1x Dolts, Halfwits, Fools, Morons! - Transfer any number of actions on your minions to your other minions. Place a +1 power counter on each of your minions you transferred an action to.

2x Fearless Friend - Play on your minion. Ongoing: This minion has the ability: “Talent: Move this minion.”

1x Magic Weapon - Play on a minion. Ongoing: This minion has the ability: “Talent: This minion gains +1 power until the start of your next turn for each player with a minion here OR if there is only one action on this minion, draw a card.”

1x MYAAAH! - Return a play-on-minion action from one of your minions or from your discard pile to its owner’s hand. Play it as an extra action.

1x Mystic Transference - Play on your minion. Ongoing: At the start of each other player’s turn, choose one of your actions in play that gives a talent. This minion may copy that talent immediately. Talent: Transfer one of your actions between this minion and another of your minions.

1x Now You Know: Toxic Waste - Draw a play-on-minion action from your deck. Special: You may play this before a base scores to transfer an action from one of your minions to another instead; then you may use a talent on the minion the action was transferred to.

1x Powerful Sword - Play on your minion. Ongoing: This minion has the ability: “Talent: This minion is not affected by other players’ cards until the start of your next turn.” Talent: Transfer another action from this minion to another of your minions.

1x Sword That’s Powerful - Play on your minion. Ongoing: This minion has the ability: “Talent: Place a +1 power counter on this minion.” If this minion’s printed power is 5 or more, it has +2 power.
characters:
1x Gal-Woman - power 5 - Talent: Play an extra play-on-minion action from any player’s discard pile. At the end of the turn, or when it leaves play, place it on the bottom of its owner’s deck.

1x Guy-Man - power 5 - Talent: Copy the talent of another one of your minions.

2x Andko - power 3 - Talent: Play an extra action on a minion that does not have one on it.

2x Man with Arms - power 3 - Talent: If this minion has an action on it, it gains +2 power until the start of your next turn. Ongoing: Once per turn, when this minion would use a talent given by an action, it may instead use another of its talents an extra time.

2x Frogga - power 2 - Draw a play-on-minion action off the top of your deck. Ongoing: When this minion leaves play, you may shuffle an action of it into your deck.

2x Young Noble - power 2 - Talent: If a Sword card is on this minion, swap this minion for a minion of power 5 or more from your hand, deck, or discard pile.
clarifications:
Here are the official clarifications as they appear in the Half the Battle rulebook:

Armor of Battle: The change to the breakpoint is calculated when the talent is invoked, and does not change even if the number of your minions there with actions changes.

Dolts, Halfwits, Fools, Morons!: If you transfer multiple actions to the same minion, it still only gets one +1 power counter.

Fearless Friend, Armor of Battle, Magic Weapon, Powerful Sword, Sword That’s Powerful: If this action is transferred from minion A to minion B, both A and B can use the talent given by the action while it is on them. If it is transferred back to A, A has a new copy of the talent and can use it a second time. If the action is on Young Noble when it swaps to a different minion, that minion also gets the talent. If the action is on another player’s minion, that player chooses whether and how to use the talent, not you. If both copies of Fearless Friend are on the same minion, it has and can use the given talent twice.

Guy-Man: The talent you copy can be a minion’s printed ability (e.g. Man With Arms), or a talent given by an action to the minion (e.g. by Powerful Sword’s Ongoing ability), but it cannot be a play-on minion action’s own printed talent (e.g. Powerful Sword’s own talent).

Mystic Transferrence, Guy-Man: When one card copies the ability of another card, the ability is resolved as if the first card had that ability. That card is not considered to actually have that ability in any other way or at other times. Mystic Transference only lets you use the copied talent in the Start Turn phase.

Now You Know: Toxic Waste: “Instead” here means “instead of this card’s on-play ability”.

Now You Know: Toxic Waste: “Another” here means another of your minions.

Young Noble: A Sword card is a play-on-minion action with “Sword” in its name: Sword That’s Powerful, Powerful Sword, Laser Sword, Family Sword. Although the two cards have different art, they are considered identical and copies of each other for all game purposes.
